name: PolicyValidationReceipt
description: Privacy-safe aggregate release and test evidence, stored outside the active INSIGHTS product store, that built-in analytical policies and the candidate report shape passed private gates.
schema_def: PolicyValidationReceipt {receiptId, policySetFingerprint, reportSchemaVersion, producerContractVersions, windowPolicyVersion, corpusFingerprint, expectedStateFingerprint, evaluationToolVersion, structuralCaseIds[], aggregateOutcomes, falseHighSeverityCount, disclosureCanaryStatus, ownerDecisionId, ownerAcceptedImprovement, createdAt}.
aggregateOutcomes counts Supported, Unavailable, InsufficientEvidence, CorrectSignal, IncorrectSignal, CorrectSeverity, FalseSeverity, and Canary outcomes.
Required shapes: sparse, zero, recurring, front-loaded, irregular, refund-heavy, plan-change, category-lifecycle, classification-gap, correction, and false-severity.
Forbidden fields: manifest filename or path, amount, merchant text, report payload, source row, expected row, or private case body.

Storage boundary: release or test evidence outside active insights.db; the released catalogue embeds only the passed policy and receipt fingerprints. A changed policy cannot enter the catalogue without a passing compatible receipt; unchanged released policies remain usable when the corpus is absent.
